positive: A minimalist, abstract geometric mountain range composed of interlocking crystalline shards and stylized floral motifs. The design features clean, sharp silhouettes in a complementary palette of deep sapphire blue, burnt orange, and cream. The composition is perfectly centered, designed for maximum impact on fabric, with strong contrast against a neutral background. Style: Modern flat design, Japanese origami influence, vector illustration quality. Lighting: Studio diffused, high contrast. Print-friendly, suitable for embroidery or screen printing.
